item.title: Low Carb Keto Chicken Alfredo with Zucchini Noodles: Creamy & Guilt-Free Dinner
item.description: This creamy keto chicken alfredo swaps pasta for zucchini noodles, making it a perfect low-carb dinner. The rich garlic cream sauce with tender chicken makes it feel indulgent but healthy. Great for any night you want comfort without the carbs!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 2 medium zucchinis, spiralized into noodles
  • 1 lb boneless skinless chicken breasts, thinly sliced
  • 2 tablespoons olive oil
  • 3 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1 cup heavy cream
  • 1/2 cup freshly grated Parmesan cheese
  • 1/4 cup unsalted butter
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste
  • 1/4 teaspoon nutmeg (optional)
  • Fresh parsley, chopped for garnish

👩‍🍳 Instructions
